data.name: Femdom Hero 4
data.detailed_description:
After Kurowi accidentally reveals her identity to Lyra, Lyra immediately prepares to fight, but you quickly explain that Kurowi isn't evil or hostile and that she's just a bit weird. With Lyra being aggressive due to her jealousy, and with Kurowi believing that Lyra is too cruel and cold towards you, Kurowi challenges her to a duel, whoever can make you cum last wins. And now, Kurowi, the eccentric, big-breasted goth witch, and Lyra, your sadistic, energetic, aggressive, tsundere childhood friend, both try to make you cum and get you to admit who you like best.

Experience being fought over by a sexy, eccentric, big-breasted goth witch and your sadistic, big-breasted, tsundere childhood friend, who both do their best to make you cum.

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 21 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
